meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Huawei repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Huawei Phone Repair Winnipeg | Broken Screens, Bad Batteries | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Expert Huawei repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, motherboard repair for Huawei P60, P50, Mate, Nova & Honor devices. Hard-to-find parts specialists.
page.h1: Huawei Phone Repair Services in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: Don't let parts availability stop you from repairing your Huawei device. We specialize in sourcing components for Huawei P series, Mate, Nova, and Honor phones in Winnipeg when others can't.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: OLED and LCD display replacements for Huawei P series, Mate, and Nova devices.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life to your Huawei device. Same-day replacement for most models.

services.name: SuperCharge Repair
services.description: USB-C charging port and SuperCharge fast charging diagnosis and repair for all Huawei devices.

services.name: Leica Camera Repair
services.description: Leica-engineered camera repairs on Huawei flagships.

services.name: Motherboard Repair
services.description: Component-level motherboard diagnostics and micro-soldering repair.

services.name: Fingerprint Sensor
services.description: In-display and rear fingerprint sensor repairs and calibration.

advantage_pillars.title: Huawei Specialists in Winnipeg
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized knowledge of Huawei devices when most shops turn them away.

advantage_pillars.title: Hard-to-Find Parts
advantage_pillars.description: We maintain supplier relationships for Huawei parts that others can't source.

advantage_pillars.title: SuperCharge Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We diagnose and repair SuperCharge, fast charging, and all power delivery systems.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: Huawei P Series
model_categories.description: Premium Huawei phones with Leica cameras.

models_description: We repair all Huawei and Honor devices including P series, Mate series, Nova series, and foldable models.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Huawei repair costs depend on parts availability—as a brand with supply chain challenges, some components require specialty sourcing. Huawei's official support portal provides device diagnostics.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that Huawei parts can be as expensive as Samsung or Apple parts. iFixit's Huawei teardowns show why certain models are difficult to source parts for.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense for your device's value, we'll explain alternatives and help you decide.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair Huawei phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops in Winnipeg that specializes in Huawei devices.

faqs.question: Are Huawei parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain supplier relationships for Huawei parts that others can't source. Most parts available within 2-3 days.

faqs.question: How long does Huawei screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most Huawei screen replacements are completed same-day once parts are available, typically within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you repair Honor phones?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair all Honor devices which were formerly part of Huawei.

faqs.question: Can you repair Huawei phones without Google services?
faqs.answer: Yes! We repair all Huawei hardware regardless of whether the device has Google Mobile Services or Huawei Mobile Services.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
